name: hospitality procurement officers processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For hospitality procurement officers processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late orders and supplier penalties. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of purchase orders and supplier invoices.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of purchase orders and supplier invoices.
